At the start use τ∈[0,H]，then continue.

Middle window τ∈[0,H] precedes Z_int↓q=3，and remains ordered.

release/hold/v_u(t)

┌──── local overlap│  ● → ■└──── R_UA
const ratio = left / right;
console.log(ratio);

Negative cases: version 2.9.0, date 2026-06-28, https://example.com/a/b, A/B testing, x = prose.

Final recommendation: do not show plain τ∈[0,H]。
